title: Items Timer
description: The mod displays a timer until the item disappears
body:
## Description
The mod displays a timer until the item disappears.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jzklurbL/images/40ead57fb473e1dbd965962e4dbc0c2efa1bfcdf.png)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
